tasks.title: Modify vocabulary import logic to update Word tab state
tasks.description: Update the vocabulary import function to trigger an update or refresh of the Word tab's displayed word list. This involves modifying the import handler to dispatch an event or update the relevant React state/store that the Word tab listens to, ensuring the newly imported words appear immediately.
acceptanceCriteria: Imported words trigger a UI update in the Word tab
No regression in vocabulary import functionality
tasks.expectedResult: After importing vocabulary, the Word tab UI immediately shows the newly imported words without requiring a manual refresh.

outputPlan.description: Update import handler to notify Word tab of new words

metadata.inputContext: Current vocabulary import logic and Word tab state management
evidence: imported words appear in Word tab UI
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures imported words are visible in the Word tab, improving user experience.

tasks.title: Modify Word tab component to listen for vocabulary updates
tasks.description: Update the Word tab React component to listen for vocabulary import events or state changes. Implement necessary hooks or subscriptions to the vocabulary store or context so that the component re-renders and displays the updated list of words when new words are imported.
acceptanceCriteria: Word tab updates its displayed word list when vocabulary changes
No UI regressions in Word tab
tasks.expectedResult: Word tab component dynamically updates to show newly imported words without manual refresh.

outputPlan.description: Add state subscription or event listener to update word list on vocabulary import

metadata.inputContext: Vocabulary import update mechanism from previous task
evidence: Word tab UI updates on vocabulary import
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Makes Word tab reactive to vocabulary imports, ensuring UI consistency.

tasks.title: Add integration test for vocabulary import and Word tab update
tasks.description: Create or extend an integration test that imports vocabulary words and verifies that the Word tab UI displays the imported words. This test should simulate the import process and check the rendered output of the Word tab component for the presence of the new words.
acceptanceCriteria: Integration test covers vocabulary import and Word tab update
tasks.expectedResult: Automated test verifies that importing vocabulary results in updated Word tab display.

outputPlan.description: Integration test for vocabulary import and Word tab UI update

metadata.inputContext: Vocabulary import and Word tab update implementation
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides automated verification that imported words appear in Word tab.
